channel.title: Projects on Suyog
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Suyog

item.title: NyaySathi: Nepal Legal Chatbot
item.description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) legal assistant for Nepal that answers law-related questions with concise explanations and citations from official legal documents.

item.title: Retinal Vessel Segmentation with U-Net
item.description: A medical image segmentation project using a custom U-Net on DRIVE retinal images, with Dice and IoU based evaluation and Streamlit inference UI.

item.title: RSICD Remote Sensing Image Captioning
item.description: An encoder-decoder image captioning study on RSICD comparing CNN+LSTM and CNN+Transformer approaches for satellite imagery understanding.

item.title: Uncertainty-Aware Fine-Tuning for LLMs
item.description: A fine-tuning experiment on Llama 3.2 1B that reduces hallucinations by training the model to abstain with ‘I don’t know’ when uncertain.
